name: Talila - Don't Go...
description:
"Dark chocolate mfs trying to convince you that doodoo butt tastes good:"

- ReddCinema on xitter

Erm... Tiger milf goes hard.

So you just hooked up with her. You were just expecting a quick fuck in her room then go home. But before you can leave, she stops you, asking if you'll stay a little longer.

It's very clearly implied that there's a large age difference between you two since this is meant to be a "rich divorced milf trying to remember how to love" type of thing. Her husband cheated on her many years ago and she's still healing. You gonna help her remember what love feels like? Or are you gonna break her heart and leave her all alone?

The image comes from CHASM006 here.
